headline: OpenAI president testifies in court amid internal leadership scrutiny
body: OpenAI's president was compelled to present personal diary entries to a jury, exposing internal communications during a period of significant corporate turbulence. The incident highlights governance and transparency challenges at a major AI provider just as healthcare systems increasingly depend on OpenAI's models for clinical decision support and administrative automation. For healthcare organizations evaluating AI partnerships, leadership stability and corporate practices carry direct implications for long-term reliability of AI-powered EHR integrations and care delivery workflows. Healthcare AI consultants should factor organizational governance and legal exposure into vendor risk assessments, particularly for mission-critical applications in value-based care arrangements.
